name: Ishkitini, Screech-Omen
description: A Choctaw death-owl whose cry stirs the hair on your arms before the wind arrives.

features.name: Gravewind
features.description: Choose a point within Far. All targets within Close of that point must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (11) or mark a Stress.

features.name: Omen's Shadow
features.description: The first time each round a PC spends Hope within Far of Ishkitini, they must mark a Stress.

features.name: Feather Drift
features.description: When targeted by an attack beyond Close, move to Far after the roll resolves; your next attack has advantage.
features.trigger: Targeted by an attack beyond Close

features.name: Thorns for Liars
features.description: When a creature within Very Close breaks a promise made in this scene, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against them with advantage.
features.trigger: A creature within Very Close breaks a promise made in this scene

name: Deer Woman, Boundary-Warden
description: Hooves like polished onyx, eyes that see the line between welcome and harm.

features.name: Mirror of Conduct
features.description: The first time each scene a PC acts with flagrant disrespect (cruel taunt, broken promise to an NPC, etc.) within Close, increase this adversary's Difficulty by +2 against that PC for the scene.

features.name: At The Crossroads
features.description: Invite a target within Close into a ring marked of hoof-prints. The target must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (11) or become Entranced. While Entranced, they choose: confess a recent harm they have done (clear 1 Stress and gain advantage on their next roll against Deer Woman) or remain Entranced and become Vulnerable.

features.name: Thorns for Liars
features.description: When a creature within Very Close breaks a promise made in this scene, mark a Stress to make a standard attack against them with advantage.
features.trigger: A creature within Very Close breaks a promise made in this scene

name: Kushtaka, Drowned-Voice
description: A Tlingit river-otter shapeshifter whose echo sounds like a cousin calling for help.

features.name: Echo of Kin
features.description: A target within Close hears a familiar voice. They must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (11) or slide up to Very Close toward the nearest water and become Vulnerable.

features.name: Otter Shape
features.description: While in or adjacent to water, gain resistance to physical damage and advantage on Agility Reaction Rolls.

features.name: Cold Embrace
features.description: When hit by a melee attack, mark a Stress to pull the attacker to Very Close of the nearest water and both become Restrained until the attacker succeeds on a Strength Roll (11) or spends a Hope.
features.trigger: Hit by a melee attack

name: Pukwudgie Needle-Path
description: A knee-high mischief-maker of the Wampanoag wood, spines like hawthorn, lantern-moss winking in its fist.

features.name: Foxfire Tangle
features.description: Place a foxfire within Close. Creatures who move toward it must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (11) or become Lost until they clear a Stress (treat allies as one range farther).

features.name: Quill Cloud
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Close. On a success, deal 1d6+2 physical and Dizzy the target. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.

features.name: Between the Roots
features.description: When missed by an attack, become Hidden and move to any point within Far.
features.trigger: Missed by an attack

name: Mannegishi Bridge-Saboteur
description: A six-fingered Cree trickster of timbers and twine, giggling from the underside of planks.

features.name: Twig Tripline
features.description: Arm a tripline at a point within Close. The first creature to cross must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (11) or become Restrained.

features.name: Undercut the Keel
features.description: Target a creature on a raft, bridge, or bank within Close. The ground or craft becomes Slippery; that target must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (11) or fall prone.

features.name: Skitter & Cackle
features.description: When a trap you set triggers, move to Far and become Hidden.
features.trigger: A trap you set triggers

name: Adlet Sled-Raiders
description: Dog-people of snow-hard trails, charging in a spray of grit and breath.

features.name: Horde (2d4+2)
features.description: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+2 physical instead.

features.name: Sledge Charge
features.description: Mark a Stress to sweep in a straight line from Far to Close, making an attack against all in your path; targets you succeed against take 2d6+3 physical and are knocked to Far unless they succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14).

features.name: Harness Drag
features.description: When your attack causes a target to mark HP, they become Restrained until they clear a Stress or succeed on a Strength Roll (14).
features.trigger: Your attack causes a target to mark HP

name: Wampus Cat, Night-Prowler
description: Green-gold eyes in the pine dark; a hunter whose veil of whiskers drinks moonlight.

features.name: Mask of the Cat
features.description: While Hidden, your standard attack has advantage and deals +1d6 damage.

features.name: Moon-Pace
features.description: Erupt from cover to Very Close and make a standard attack. On a success, also Dizzy the target and knock them to Close. Dizzied targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, and then clear the condition.

features.name: Whisker-Shade
features.description: When targeted by a ranged attack, mark a Stress to impose disadvantage on that attack. If it misses, become Hidden.
features.trigger: Targeted by a ranged attack

name: Amarok, Lone-Howl
description: The great wolf of the Inuit night, hunting alone where the snow sparks under its paws.

features.name: Hunts Alone
features.description: If no other adversary is within Close, your standard attack has advantage and deals +1d6 damage.

features.name: Whiteout Lunge
features.description: Move to Very Close and make a standard attack. On a success, the target must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (14) or be knocked prone and Restrained.

features.name: Midnight Howl
features.description: When a PC spends Hope within Far, mark a Stress to force that PC to make an Instinct Reaction Roll (14) or become Vulnerable.
features.trigger: A PC spends Hope within Far

name: Nalusa Falaya, Shadow-Bent
description: A Choctaw shadow that bends like smoke and speaks in the voice you use inside your head.

features.name: Lay the Shadow
features.description: Cast a living shadow that tethers between you and a target within Close. While the tether persists, that target has disadvantage on Presence and Instinct rolls and marks 1 Stress if they move through bright light. The tether ends if you mark HP.

features.name: Bad Thoughts
features.description: The first time each PC indulges in cruel mockery or mean-spirited sabotage, increase this adversary's Difficulty by +2 until end of scene.

features.name: Hide in Another
features.description: When targeted by an attack beyond Very Close, mark a Stress to become a shifting stain on a creature within Close until your next turn. While attached, you can't be targeted; the host is Vulnerable.
features.trigger: Targeted by an attack beyond Very Close

name: Bukwus, Bone-Beggar
description: A Kwakwaka'wakw wild man of the cedar gloom, offering ghost food in a palm of wind.

features.name: Food of the Dead
features.description: Offer unseen delicacies to all targets within Close. Each target chooses: partake (mark a Stress and gain advantage on their next action, but you count them as In a Wake: your attacks against them deal an additional +1d6) or refuse and become Vulnerable until they mark a Stress.

features.name: Between Cedar Shadows
features.description: While within forest, you have resistance to physical damage and advantage on Instinct Reactions.

features.name: Hollow Invitation
features.description: When a PC has no ally within Close, mark a Stress to move adjacent and become Hidden.
features.trigger: A PC has no ally within Close

name: Mishipeshu, River-Claws
description: The Underwater Panther of the Anishinaabe lakes, copper-bright horns cutting the current.

features.name: Copper Hide
features.description: Reduce physical damage you take by 3 (minimum 1).

features.name: Undertow Spiral
features.description: Target a creature within Close in or adjacent to water. On a success, deal 3d8+4 magic damage. The target must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (17) or become Restrained and slide to Far into the water.

features.name: Way of The Water Shatter
features.description: When hit by a ranged attack, mark a Stress to lash the surface and shove it towards the attacker. The attacker must succeed on an Instinct Reaction Roll (17) or take 2d6+4 magic damage.
features.trigger: Hit by a ranged attack

name: Baykok, Hollow-Bow
description: A gaunt Ojibwe hunter of bones; arrows hum like teeth chattering in deep winter.

features.name: Death Whistle
features.description: Choose a point within Far and begin a countdown (2). It ticks down whenever a PC moves toward that point. When it triggers, make an attack against all targets within Close of the point; those you succeed against lose a Hope and take 3d8+4 magic.

features.name: Skinner's Hook
features.description: When a target within Far becomes Vulnerable, mark a Stress to yank them to Close and make a standard attack.
features.trigger: A target within Far becomes Vulnerable

name: Uktena, Crystal-Crest
description: A Cherokee horned serpent, scales black as stormwater, a blaze of Ulunsuti glittering at its brow.

features.name: Hypnotic Crest
features.description: Unleash a prismatic flare in a cone within Close. Targets must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (17) or become Entranced (target cannot move away from you) until they clear a Stress.

features.name: Shedlings
features.description: Summon 1d4 Horned Serpent Minions within Close (they act as Tier-1 Minions; name and looks match your table).

features.name: Tunnel Flood
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage while water is within Close, mark a Stress to surge; all creatures within Very Close are knocked into the nearest water, and become Entranced (target cannot move away from you) until they clear another Stress.
features.trigger: You take Major or greater damage while water is within Close

name: Stonecoat, Flint-Shroud
description: A Genonskwa giant whose body is jacketed in plates of razor flint; sparks spit when it moves.

features.name: Stone Hide
features.description: Reduce physical damage you take by 2. Once per scene, you can reduce the physical damage by 5 and mark a Stress.

features.name: Boulder Stride
features.description: Plow a rocky line up to Close. Make an attack against all in your path. Targets you succeed against take 3d8+4 physical and are knocked to Far.

features.name: Shard Spray
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage, all creatures within Very Close take 1d8 magic damage.
features.trigger: You take Major or greater damage

name: Pamola, Gale-Warden of Katahdin
description: Abenaki storm spirit with the head of a moose and the wings of night; breath like rime.

features.name: Mountain's Claim
features.description: While airborne or adjacent to a cliff or peak feature, you have resistance to physical damage and advantage on Instinct Reactions.

features.name: Whiteout Wall Blizzard
features.description: Spend a Fear to create a ferocious Close-radius blizzard within Far. Terrain inside is Lightly Obscured. Creatures entering must succeed on a Strength Reaction Roll (17) or are unable to pass and are pushed back.

features.name: Talon Draft
features.description: When a creature within Far moves toward higher ground, mark a Stress to shove them one range band backward and knock them prone.
features.trigger: A creature within Far moves toward higher ground

name: Thunderbird, Storm-Judge
description: Wings like continents turning, eyes full of verdict; thunder walks where it looks.

features.name: Royal Thunder
features.description: Spend a Fear to call a strike at a point within Far. Make an attack against all within Close of that point. Targets you succeed against take 4d10+10 magic and are knocked to Far. Place a Storm token there. Ranged attacks through that area have disadvantage until the effect is cleared.

features.name: Call the Stormclutch
features.description: Summon Minions equal to party size (storm spirits in avian shapes) within Close. If any end their move within Very Close of the Thunderbird, clear 1 Stress.

features.name: Charged Decree
features.description: When a PC critically succeeds, mark a Stress to mark them Charged. The next time they move or make an attack, they must spend a Hope or take 3d10 magic damage.
features.trigger: A PC critically succeeds

name: Gaasyendietha, Meteor Serpent
description: A Seneca flaming serpent, tail full of falling stars; it writes its name across lakes at night.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: Spotlight up to two times per GM turn.

features.name: Meteor Wake
features.description: When you move, leave a burning trail of rock and flame (length of a Very Close line). Creatures entering must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (20) or mark a Stress.

features.name: Skyfall
features.description: Spend a Fear to project a blazing line to Very Far. Make an attack against all along the line; targets you succeed against take 4d10+12 magic and are knocked to Very Far.

features.name: Molten Scales
features.description: When you take Major or greater damage, mark a Stress to shed a scale at your space. The next time a PC ends their spotlight within Very Close of it, it explodes and deals 3d8+8 magic damage to all within Very Close.
features.trigger: You take Major or greater damage

name: Flying Head, Hunger-Wheel
description: An Iroquois terror--a storm of gnashing, wing-tendoned heads that batter windows and fires both.

features.name: Horde (2d10+10)
features.description: When the Horde has marked half or more of its HP, its standard attack becomes 2d10+10 magic instead.

features.name: Through the Lintel
features.description: While at least one open door or window exists in the scene, the Sluagh may be spotlighted twice this GM turn. The second spotlight can only move or use the standard attack.

features.name: Cursed Bite
features.description: When your attack causes a target to mark HP, you may mark a Stress to force that target to spend a Hope or mark 1 Stress.
features.trigger: Your attack causes a target to mark HP

name: Windigo, Winter-Hunger
description: A gauntness that learned to walk, eyes like old ice, breath that smells of empty cupboards.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Windigo can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual.

features.name: Gnaw Hope
features.description: The first time each round a PC within Far marks Stress, they also lose a Hope.

features.name: Hungry Wind
features.description: Spend a Fear to rake all targets within Close with a freezing gale. Targets you succeed against take 4d8+10 magic and must mark a Stress; targets already at max Stress become Vulnerable and Restrained.

features.name: Cold Misty Step
features.description: When you take damage, move to Far in a swirl of snow and shadow; the attacker marks a Stress.
features.trigger: You take damage

name: Tla'Nuwa, Cliff-King
description: A Cherokee eagle of the red rock bluffs; talons like grapnels, cry like bronze torn in half.

features.name: Nest on the Red Ledge
features.description: While adjacent to a cliff or ledge feature, gain resistance to physical damage.

features.name: Eagle Warcry
features.description: Spend a Fear to spotlight up to 1d4 allies within Far and place each on higher ground within Close. Each ally targetted gains advantage on their next attack.

features.name: Drop to the River
features.description: On a successful attack, you may grapple the target and carry them to Far, then force an Agility Reaction Roll (20). On a failure, they take 4d8+10 physical and are knocked to Very Far.

features.name: Feather Storm
features.description: When you mark HP, razor feathers lash all within Very Close for 2d6 magic.
features.trigger: You mark HP
